name: Magical Girl Rising
description: A first single-player campaign where the player pilots a Magical Girl deck through escalating AI encounters and defeats the final boss.

encounters.name: Crow Scouts
encounters.intro_text: A probing enemy force tests your opening deck and reaction timing before the real threats arrive.

encounters.name: Velvet Assault
encounters.intro_text: Velvet's lieutenants lean on sharper Baddie pressure and punish weak encounter turns.

encounters.name: Queen of Glass
encounters.intro_text: The campaign boss doubles down on tempo pressure and asks you to close before the counterpunch lands.
